headline: EQT (OM:EQT) Valuation Check After Recent Mixed Share Price Performance
summary: EQT (OM:EQT) is back in focus after a period during which the share price has delivered mixed returns, including roughly flat performance over the past month and a decline over the past three months. See our latest analysis for EQT. At the latest share price of SEK286.7, EQT’s 1 day share price return of 2.02% loss and 90 day share price return of 19.96% loss sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 13.38%. This suggests that recent momentum has softened following a stronger period...
